global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with geometric shapes and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting the MoonScreen app with an exclusive offer.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The text 'MoonScreen' is prominently displayed at the top in a bold, modern font, likely white or light-colored.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, are centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: Another rectangular shape is placed slightly lower, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Small circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is positioned towards the bottom center, likely representing a feature or option.

elements.label: Small circular icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon is placed next to the previous one, maintaining symmetry.

elements.label: Small circular icon
elements.description: A third small circular icon is aligned with the others, completing a row of three.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: The text 'Exclusive tonight Cancel anytime' is displayed in a clear, readable font, likely white, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: The button 'Start now' is located at the bottom center, designed to stand out with a contrasting color.
